description.value:
Prerequisite: Str 13, base attack bonus +1.

Benefit: You can wield one-handed and two-handed weapons one size larger than you as a one-handed or two-handed weapon (respectively), though you still suffer the -2 penalty for wielding a weapon one size too large. In addition, you can perform techniques with a half seal component or cast spells with somatic components while wielding a two-handed weapon, as you temporarily free one of your hands.
description.summary: You can wield one-handed and two-handed weapons one size larger than you as a one-handed or two-handed weapon…
